Bash(curl -s "https://platform.altinn.no/accessmanagement/api/v1/meta/info/accesspackages/search" -H "Accept: application/json" | python -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\(f'Totalt antall tilgangspakker: {len\(data\)}'\)
print\(\)
for i, pkg in enumerate\(data, 1\):
    obj = pkg.get\('object', pkg\)
    name = obj.get\('name', 'N/A'\)
    urn = obj.get\('urn', 'N/A'\)
    area = obj.get\('area', {}\).get\('name', 'N/A'\)
    print\(f'{i:3}. [{area}] {name}'\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import json
f=open\(r'C:/Users/RUNLAR/.claude/projects/C--repos-altinnservicecatalogue/9b87c062-302f-4682-b16c-f470a6301393/tool-results/mcp-altinn-search_packages-1773134599729.txt'\)
data=json.load\(f\)
pkgs=json.loads\(data[0]['text']\)
for i,p in enumerate\(pkgs\):
    o=p['object']
    print\(f\\"{i+1}. {o['name']}\\"\)
    print\(f\\"   URN: {o['urn']}\\"\)
    print\(f\\"   Desc: {o['description'][:150]}\\"\)
    print\(f\\"   Delegable: {o['isDelegable']}, Assignable: {o['isAssignable']}\\"\)
    area=o.get\('area',{}\)
    print\(f\\"   Area: {area.get\('name','?'\)}\\"\)
    print\(\)
")
